description: Perform a Naive Bayes multiclass classification on the ToothGrowth dataset to predict vitamin C dose levels using 'len' and 'supp' as predictors. Ensure the 'dose' variable is treated as a categorical (nominal) variable. Use either a 70/30 training/test split or 5-fold cross-validation with a seed of 42. The analysis should include the confusion matrix and classification accuracy. Save the JASP analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/NaiveBayesDose.jasp and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/naive_bayes_report.txt including the algorithm name, the overall classification accuracy, the confusion matrix counts, and a sentence interpreting which dose level was easiest or hardest to classify.
